title: ADVENTIST CLOTHING SHARE - 211info
text: SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES ADVENTIST CLOTHING SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used clothing, bedding, and towels and accepts donations of like items. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 10am-2pm or by appointment Email (541) 563-3710 3 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 563-3710 ext 3 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Towns of Five Rivers, Seal Rock, Tidewater, Waldport, and Yachats (Lincoln County only) SITE HOURS: Varies by service TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: In industrial area south of Waldport schools Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - WALDPORT FOOD SHARE MATERIAL GOODS - APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT UTILITIES - VOUCHER ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
